focus: This 8 PM MDT run uses 2026-06-28 local-day Garmin data through 18:51 MDT; Garmin's automatic current-date endpoints had already advanced to 2026-06-29 and were mostly null.

Primary recovery call: readiness 1/Poor, sleep score 33 with only 3h39m asleep and 0m REM, HRV 37 ms Unbalanced, Body Battery 11, and RHR 68 vs 66 average argue strongly against any more training tonight.
Current 2026-06-28 output: 4,274 steps, 3.65 km, 82 active kcal, 2,195 total kcal, and 0 moderate / 0 vigorous intensity minutes today.
Best signals: weekly intensity remains 397/150 min, ACWR is 0.9 Optimal, training status is Productive, and VO₂ max is stable around 43.
Caution: sleep need for 2026-06-29 is raised to 9h, sleep stress averaged 41, stress max hit 83, and SpO₂ daily low was 84.
Nutrition log latest manual entry remains 2026-06-03: ~820 kcal, ~82g protein, water not logged; no Garmin calories consumed/hydration data populated for today.
Rollback to a sanitized public view is scheduled for July 3, 2026.
displayNotes: Evening runs prefer the current local-day Garmin stats; if Garmin's default date has rolled forward and returns null, use the latest complete local day and label the source date in updated/focus text.
Use cards for scanability on iPhone: one primary number, status pill, and 2–3 details.
Use baseline/range visualization for HRV and RHR because personal baseline matters more than population comparison.
Use progress bars for readiness, sleep score, Body Battery, stress, steps, intensity minutes, training load, and nutrition.

Source fields include training readiness, HRV baseline, sleep score/duration/stages, Body Battery wake/current/charge/drain, stress average/max/rest split, steps/distance/active calories, weekly intensity minutes, acute load/ACWR, VO₂ max, nutrition calories/protein/water, resting HR vs 7-day average, SpO₂, and respiration.
